title: Kalisz、Greater Poland — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Kalisz、Greater Polandの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

KaliszはGreater Polandにある人口99,106の都市です。One of Poland’s oldest cities, dating back over 2,000 years, known for its historic old town, textile industry, and the nearby Prosna River.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
